creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
These versions are maintenance releases and contain bug fixes only.

These releases aim to address a regression for projects not having configured any system maintainers or using the development application context.


For details about the releases, please see:

https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/11.5.12
https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/10.4.30
https://typo3.org/article/typo3-11512-and-10430-maintenance-releases-published
